revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿一]][[zh:六月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿一]][[zh:六月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿一]][[zh:六月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿一]][[zh:六月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 21|qq=June 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * Year 18 of {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|746|en|746|qid=Q23616|lt=746|1=746}} ) – {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|en|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|qid=Q386308|lt=Ōtomo no Yakamochi|1=Ōtomo no Yakamochi}} was appointed as governor (Kokushi) of {{ill|Etchū Province|ja|Etchū Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etchū Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpyō-shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō-shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373169}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22|1=July 22}} , {{ill|756|en|756|qid=Q31121|lt=756|1=756}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} 's belongings were dedicated to the Rushana Buddha at {{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|qid=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}} . Later, {{ill|Shōsōin|en|Shōsōin|qid=Q2379007|lt=Shōsōin|1=Shōsōin}} was built to store these items. * Year 12 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1635|en|1635|qid=Q6879|lt=1635|1=1635}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} revised the {{ill|Buke shohatto|en|Buke shohatto|qid=Q289817|lt=Buke Shohatto|1=Buke shohatto}} , mandating annual {{ill|Sankin-kōtai|en|Sankin-kōtai|qid=Q1151844|lt=Sankin-kōtai|1=Sankin-kōtai}} (alternate attendance) for {{ill|Tozama daimyō|en|Tozama daimyō|qid=Q1195912|lt=Tozama Daimyō|1=Tozama daimyō}} each April.
== Births == * Year 3 of {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}} ) – {{ill|Hayashi Shihei|en|Hayashi Shihei|qid=Q382306|lt=Hayashi Shihei|1=Hayashi Shihei}} , economist and scholar (d. {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ) * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} ) – {{ill|Isobe Hyakurin|ja|磯部百鱗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isobe Hyakurin|1=Isobe Hyakurin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18990389}} , painter (d. {{ill|1906|en|1906|qid=Q2049|lt=1906|1=1906}} )<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E7%A3%AF%E9%83%A8%E7%99%BE%E9%B1%97-1053994|title=磯部百鱗（いそべ ひゃくりん）とは|work={{ill|Kotobank|en|Kotobank|qid=Q11302260|lt=Kotobank|1=Kotobank}} |accessdate=2015-02-05|qq=}} </ref> * Year 3 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22|1=July 22}} , {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ) – {{ill|Asai Chū|en|Asai Chū|qid=Q720550|lt=Asai Chū|1=Asai Chū}} , painter (d. {{ill|1907|en|1907|qid=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} ) * Year 4 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – {{ill|Kazushige Ugaki|en|Kazushige Ugaki|qid=Q1148095|lt=Ugaki Kazushige|1=Kazushige Ugaki}} , army officer and politician (d. {{ill|1956|en|1956|qid=Q5221|lt=1956|1=1956}} )
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|qid=Q2726|lt=July 19|1=July 19}} , {{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Munemori|en|Taira no Munemori|qid=Q2420085|lt=Taira no Munemori|1=Taira no Munemori}} , samurai commander and son of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1147|en|1147|qid=Q19629|lt=1147|1=1147}} ) * Year 5 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 28|en|July 28|qid=Q2718|lt=July 28|1=July 28}} , {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ) – Hayashi Shihei, economist and scholar (b. {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}} ) * Year 5 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Toyoshige|en|Yamauchi Toyoshige|qid=Q711001|lt=Yamauchi Toyoshige|1=Yamauchi Toyoshige}} (Yōdō), 14th lord of the {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|qid=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} (b. {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|20|6|22|5|21|7|6|0621|qq=}}
